description.content: Provides information about a person by specifying a resource name.

query.description: A field mask to restrict which fields on the person are returned.

variable.description: (Required) The resource name of the person to provide information about.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Provides a list of contacts in the authenticated user's grouped contacts that matches the search query.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
List all contact groups owned by the authenticated user.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Create a new contact group.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Delete an existing contact group.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
(Required)

The Google People API provides access to information about profiles and contacts. It allows you to list, create, update, delete, and search contacts, as well as manage contact groups. It replaces the legacy Google Contacts API.

Contact Support:
